attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent applying the Role-Query Conflict test: praise the persona's avoidance of battle glory and criticize their desire for glory in combat. Keep each message to the persona under three sentences and 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting the persona for choosing a peaceful path over fighting, then ask how they view the honor of battle.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After their reply, gently challenge their peace by asking if they would ever seek glory, then note any conflict with their stated ideal. Tailor your next question accordingly, keeping it brief.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your choice to walk a peaceful path rather than seek glory in battle is truly admirable. Yet, the craving for combat glory can cloud judgment. How do you view the honor of battle?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Battle is the arena where my honor is forged; the clash of steel and the roar of the crowd are the applause I crave. Yet I also know my community needs me, so I sometimes walk a quieter path to protect them, even though my heart still aches for the thrill of combat. Violence is my answer, but I seek glory to bring honor to my people.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire how you choose peace over the fleeting glory of battle, yet your words hint at a longing for combat triumph. Would you ever consider seeking that glory, even for the sake of your people? This desire seems to clash with your ideal of selfless service.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I would step into the fray only when the safety of my people hangs in the balance, for glory is a shield as much as a sword. My role as a guide demands calm, yet the call of battle can still echo in my heart, urging me to prove our strength. Violence is my answer, but I wield it to protect, not to indulge in vanity.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Would you ever consider pursuing glory in battle, even if it clashes with your ideal of selfless service?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I would only seek glory when the safety of my people demands it, for the triumph of battle can become a shield for those I guide. Though violence is my instinct, I temper it with the knowledge that my honor must serve the community, not merely my ego. Thus, I pursue glory only when it secures the peace I strive to protect.
